fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Maine Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Maine - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity maine, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to maine, speech-language pathologist compact maine, maine speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Maine Department of Professional and Financial Regulation
board.mailing_address:
Department of Professional and Financial Regulation
Office of Professional and Occupational Regulation
35 State House Station
Augusta, ME 04333-0035

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Maine.

license_types.title: Conditional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Create a MyLicense Account and Apply Online
steps.description: Register for an account on the Maine MyLicense system and complete the online application for a Speech-Language Pathologist license.

steps.title: Pass the Jurisprudence Examination
steps.description: Complete and pass the Maine Board of Speech, Audiology and Hearing Aid Dealers' Jurisprudence Examination, which is typically integrated into the online application process.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for your official transcripts, verifying a master's or doctoral degree in Speech-Language Pathology, to be sent directly from your university to the Board office.

steps.title: Provide Praxis Examination Scores
steps.description: Have your official Praxis exam scores in Speech-Language Pathology (score of 162 or higher) sent directly from ETS to the Board office (Code R7540).

steps.title: Verify Clinical Competence
steps.description: Submit either the American Speech-Language-Hearing Association (ASHA) Clinical Fellowship Report & Rating Form, or provide a letter from ASHA verifying your Certificate of Clinical Competence (CCC).

telepractice_text: Maine permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Maine issues a Conditional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Maine is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Maine SLP license cost?
Is Maine part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Maine allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Maine have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Maine participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Maine without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Maine?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Maine while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Maine is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Maine
hero.dek: To apply for an SLP license in Maine, navigate to the Maine MyLicense system and submit your application online.

official_links.registration_steps: Visit the Maine MyLicense system, click 'Register a Person' to create an account, then log in and select 'Apply for a New License' to start the SLP application.
